calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-05-2013 Vacated

Petition To Set Aside Restatement Of Trust
Off Calendar Jan-29-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ross Madden for and with Nicole Bomar (Respondent). Stephen O'Neill appeared by telephone for Beloria Levy.

The matter was referred to the Department of the Presiding Judge (206) for trial setting (order for the same signed in open Court).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Anasse.

Petition To Set Aside Restatement Of Trust
Off Calendar Dec-11-2012 Continued To Jan-29-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ross Madden for and with Nicole Bomar. Steve O'Neill appeared by telephone for Beloria Levy.

Mr. Madden stated that discovery was more or less completed and that he was told that Mr. O'Neill intends to file a complaint for intentional interference with inheritance. Mr. O'Neill stated that he has the draft of the complaint ready and that he extended a settlement offer to Mr. Madden. The Court stated that it makes sense to consolidate the matters. Mr. Madden stated that he was not willing to settle anything until he is sure everything that is going to be filed against his Client is filed. Mr. O'Neill stated that he will stipulate to all discovery in both matters being consolidated. The Petition to Set Aside Restatement of Trust was continued to January 29, 2013 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 for further status and for trial setting.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Benton.

Petition To Set Aside Restatement Of Trust
Off Calendar Nov-06-2012 Continued To Dec-11-12 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stephen O'Neill for Beloria Levy (Petitioner). Ross Madden for and with Nicole Bomar (Respondent).

Mr. O'Neill stated that they would need a 3-day trial. The Petition to Set Aside Restatement of Trust was continued to December 11, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on readiness of trial.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition To Set Aside Restatement Of Trust
Off Calendar Aug-01-2012 Continued To Nov-06-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
